reason: The justifications are factually accurate. Rosmerta appeared only in the PoA film (played by Julie Christie) and was entirely absent from the HBP theatrical film, despite having a major role in that book (Imperius Curse, poisoned mead, alerting Dumbledore to the Dark Mark). Her HBP appearance exists only as a deleted scene on disc 2. The scorer correctly identifies this as the central faithfulness problem. The one minor uncertainty is the claim about her being 'more confrontational and skeptical' in the film vs 'warm and curious' in the book - this is a reasonable interpretation of the PoA scene but harder to verify objectively. The 68/100 score is defensible given that her entire HBP arc (her most structurally significant role) is absent from the film corpus.
